title: Sim: Open source platform to build AI agent workflows | Y Combinator
full_text:
Sim: Open source platform to build AI agent workflows | Y Combinator
Home › Companies › Sim
Sim
Open source platform to build AI agent workflows
Spring 2025
Active
AI
San Francisco
https://sim.ai
Open source platform to build AI agent workflows
Sim enables fast-growing technical teams to build and deploy AI agent workflows.
70,000+ developers are already using Sim, integrating with 1000+ apps and LLMs to streamline workflows with AI agents.
Active Founders
Emir Karabeg
Co-Founder / CEO
Emir is the Co-Founder and CEO of Sim Studio. Emir studied Data Science and Cognitive Science at UC Berkeley, where he conducted NLP research for machine translation.
Before Sim Studio, Emir built WorkNinja, an AI learning platform with 300,000+ MAUs. WorkNinja was one of the first LLM chain-of-thought applications deployed at scale (December '22).
Emir Karabeg
Co-Founder / CEO
Emir is the Co-Founder and CEO of Sim Studio. Emir studied Data Science and Cognitive Science at UC Berkeley, where he conducted NLP research for machine translation.
Before Sim Studio, Emir built WorkNinja, an AI learning platform with 300,000+ MAUs. WorkNinja was one of the first LLM chain-of-thought applications deployed at scale (December '22).
Waleed Latif
Co-Founder & CTO
Waleed is the Co-Founder and CTO of Sim. Waleed studied CS and Cognitive Science at UC Berkeley, where he led engineering and publications for Neurotechnology at Berkeley.
Before Sim, Waleed built the core backend infrastructure for Ring at Amazon, which today processes over 1M+ transactions per second.
Waleed Latif
Co-Founder & CTO
Waleed is the Co-Founder and CTO of Sim. Waleed studied CS and Cognitive Science at UC Berkeley, where he led engineering and publications for Neurotechnology at Berkeley.
Before Sim, Waleed built the core backend infrastructure for Ring at Amazon, which today processes over 1M+ transactions per second.
Latest News
$7M Series A | Sim
Nov 12, 2025
Company Launches
Sim Studio: UI to Build AI Agents
See original launch post
TL;DR Sim Studio is an open-source interface to build and deploy AI agent workflows.
Our Figma-like canvas allows users to drag-and-drop connect LLMs to their favorite tools (Slack, Supabase, Pinecone, Gmail). Check out our launch video 👇
https://youtu.be/EAAMNXRYncY
Key Features
🤖 Build Agents that connect with any of your tools
🚀 Deploy your workflow as a chat or an API
💡 Quickly iterate and optimize your agents visually
The Problem
Agent frameworks require learning and extensive boilerplate code, and existing visual interfaces abstract most of the customization required for complex agent workflows.
Our Solution
Sim Studio is a lightweight, user-friendly platform to build, test, and deploy AI agents in minutes. You can design the entire agent architecture, with a variety of models (hosted and local via Ollama), tools with granular tool use control, and structured output.
You can trigger the workflows manually, deploy as an API , or schedule the workflows to run periodically. They can also be set to trigger on incoming webhooks (e.g., Slack messages ) and deployed as standalone chat instances.
Get an Agent Demo for Your Use Case
Request a call to watch us build an AI agent for your company in minutes.
